q: Success is not final; failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
Don't be distracted by criticism. Remember, the only taste of success some people get is to take a bite out of you.
Success seems to be connected with action. Successful people keep moving.
In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
The secret of success is to do the common thing uncommonly well.
Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
Success is doing ordinary things extraordinarily well.
There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.
Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
I failed my way to success.
The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
If you really look closely, most overnight successes took a long time.
The real test is not whether you avoid this failure, because you won't. It's whether you let it harden or shame you into inaction, or whether you learn from it; whether you choose to persevere.
Success is liking yourself, liking what you do, and liking how you do it.
Coming together is a beginning; keeping together is progress; working together is success.
Self-belief and hard work will always earn you success.
The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack of will.
Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day-in and day-out.
Don't aim for success if you want it; just do what you love and believe in, and it will come naturally.
Success is a state of mind. If you want success, start thinking of yourself as a success.
Action is the foundational key to all success.
Success is getting what you want, happiness is wanting what you get.
The best revenge is massive success.
To succeed in life, you need two things: ignorance and confidence.
Put your heart, mind, and soul into even your smallest acts. This is the secret of success.
Success is not measured by what you accomplish, but by the opposition you have encountered, and the courage with which you have maintained the struggle against overwhelming odds.
A successful man is one who can lay a firm foundation with the bricks others have thrown at him.
Defeat is not the worst of failures. Not to have tried is the true failure.
Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
Stop chasing the money and start chasing the passion.
Success is dependent on effort.
The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
I never dreamed about success, I worked for it.
Success is no accident. It is hard work, perseverance, learning, studying, sacrifice and most of all, love of what you are doing.
The only place success comes before work is in the dictionary.
Success is getting what you want. Happiness is wanting what you get.
Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
Success creates success. It generates momentum.
It is better to fail in originality than to succeed in imitation.
Develop success from failures. Discouragement and failure are two of the surest stepping stones to success.
Success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has overcome.
If you want to succeed you should strike out on new paths, rather than travel the worn paths of accepted success.
Success is simple. Do what's right, the right way, at the right time.
Most of the important things in the world have been accomplished by people who have kept on trying when there seemed to be no hope at all.
Success is the child of audacity.
The secret of success is constancy to purpose.
Eighty percent of success is showing up.
Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
Would you like me to give you a formula for success? It’s quite simple, really: Double your rate of failure.
Success consists of going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm.
The difference between who you are and who you want to be is what you do.
Success doesn't come to you, you go to it.
You know you are on the road to success if you would do your job, and not be paid for it.
There is no elevator to success. You have to take the stairs.
Behind every successful man there's a lot of unsuccessful years.
Success is falling nine times and getting up ten.
Ambition is the path to success. Persistence is the vehicle you arrive in.
Success isn't about how much money you make; it's about the difference you make in people's lives.
Don't let the fear of losing be greater than the excitement of winning.
Your positive action combined with positive thinking results in success.
Success creates confidence.
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Success is how high you bounce when you hit bottom.
The biggest risk is not taking any risk. In a world that is changing quickly, the only strategy that is guaranteed to fail is not taking risks.

I've missed more than 9000 shots in my career. I've lost almost 300 games. 26 times I've been trusted to take the game winning shot and missed. I've failed over and over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed.
Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency. Consistent hard work leads to success. Greatness will come.
Success is nothing more than a few simple disciplines, practiced every day.
Define success on your own terms, achieve it by your own rules, and build a life you're proud to live.
Success depends upon previous preparation, and without such preparation there is sure to be failure.
The real secret of success is enthusiasm.
To succeed, you need to find something to hold on to, something to motivate you, something to inspire you.
Success is knowing your purpose in life, growing to reach your maximum potential, and sowing seeds that benefit others.
A champion is afraid of losing. Everyone else is afraid of winning.
Success comes from having dreams that are bigger than your fears.
If you really want to do something, you'll find a way. If you don't, you'll find an excuse.
The difference between the impossible and the possible lies in a man's determination.
Success represents the 1% of your work which results from the 99% that is called failure.
It is hard to fail, but it is worse never to have tried to succeed.
I'm a success today because I had a friend who believed in me and I didn't have the heart to let him down.
Success is peace of mind, which is a direct result of self-satisfaction in knowing you made the effort to become the best of which you are capable.
The ladder of success is never crowded at the top.
People rarely succeed unless they have fun in what they are doing.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Before you can be a success, you must be a failure. You must be crushed and defeated.
Patience, persistence and perspiration make an unbeatable combination for success.
Success is the progressive realization of a worthy ideal.
Do not be embarrassed by your failures, learn from them and start again.
The starting point of all achievement is desire.
Without continual growth and progress, such words as improvement, achievement, and success have no meaning.
Success is a journey, not a destination.
If you want to achieve excellence, you can get there today. As of this second, quit doing less-than-excellent work.
The path to success is to take massive, determined action.
Success is a science; if you have the conditions, you get the result.
Judge your success by what you had to give up in order to get it.
The secret of your success is determined by your daily agenda.
Success is doing what you want, where you want, when you want, with whom you want as much as you want.
Self-trust is the first secret of success.
Success is not magic or mysterious. Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying basic fundamentals.
Always bear in mind that your own resolution to succeed is more important than any other.
He has achieved success who has lived well, laughed often and loved much.
Success is finding satisfaction in giving a little more than you take.
To be successful, you have to have your heart in your business, and your business in your heart.
The secret of success in life is for a man to be ready for his opportunity when it comes.
Success is focusing the full power of all you are on what you have a burning desire to achieve.
Victory is sweetest when you've known defeat.
Success is the maximum utilization of the ability that you have.
The size of your success is measured by the strength of your desire.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
Success is a lousy teacher. It seduces smart people into thinking they can't lose.
The level of our success is limited only by our imagination and no act of kindness, however small, is ever wasted.
Success is 1% inspiration, 99% perspiration.
Your success and happiness lies in you.
Choose a job you love, and you will never have to work a day in your life.
Success means doing the best we can with what we have.
The real opportunity for success lies within the person and not in the job.
Success is the result of perfection, hard work, learning from failure, loyalty, and persistence.
There is no point at which you can say, 'Well, I'm successful now. I might as well take a nap.'
Success isn't overnight. It's when every day you get a little better than the day before. It all adds up.
The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
Success is achieved and maintained by those who try and keep trying.
To succeed, we must first believe that we can.
Success is falling in love with the process.
